content: Hi, I'm trying to get back into shape after a long winter in Lisbon. I've been working out at the gym near my apartment in Alfama, but I'm not seeing the results I want.
It can be tough to get motivated, especially when you're not seeing the results you want. What kind of exercises have you been doing at the gym?
I've been focusing on cardio, trying to get my endurance up for Brazilian jiu-jitsu competitions. I love the mental and physical challenge of it.

That sounds like a great goal! Brazilian jiu-jitsu can be such a wonderful way to challenge yourself and stay active. Have you considered incorporating strength training into your routine to help with your competitions?
Actually, I have been thinking about it. My friend, Carlos, is a strength coach and he's been bugging me to start lifting weights. I'm just not sure where to start.
Well, having a friend who's a strength coach can be a great resource! Maybe you could ask Carlos to help you come up with a strength training plan?
That's a great idea. I'll talk to him about it this weekend when we're at the chess club. I'm trying to improve my game, too.
Chess is such a great game! It's wonderful that you're trying to improve your skills. Maybe you could even find a way to combine your love of chess with your fitness goals?
Ha! I'm not sure about that, but I do love playing chess and reading sci-fi novels in my free time. It's a great way for me to relax and escape reality.

That sounds like a great way to unwind! Reading can be such a wonderful way to escape and learn new things. Maybe you could even find some sci-fi novels that feature characters who are into fitness or martial arts?
That's a great idea. I'll have to look into it. I've also been trying to get into origami, which is a great way for me to relax and be creative.
Origami is such a wonderful hobby! It's great that you're trying to find ways to relax and express your creativity. Maybe you could even make some origami figures that represent your fitness goals?
I think it's great that you're exploring so many different interests and hobbies. It can be really helpful to have things that bring you joy and help you relax.

Definitely. I'm just trying to find a good balance between work, taking care of my parents, and pursuing my own interests. It's not always easy, but I'm managing, especially with the help of my documentary filmmaking work, which I love.
